metadata.title: Insisting On The Impossible: The Life of Edwin Land and Instant: The Story of Polaroid

For there are about 5,000 steps to be taken before we realize it. Start taking the first 10 and stay making 20 after it. It is amazing how quickly you get through those first 5,000 steps.
